text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A fan letter addressed to Inari One has arrived, so
I go and hand it to her.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
"I always feel revitalized when I watch you
running." Oh, those are some real heartwarming
words.
choice_data_list: There's a gift that came with the letter too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What's this? "I might be overstepping my
boundaries, but I wanted to send you a charm to
help you stay in high spirits."

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Now that's a classy gesture I won't soon
forget!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Right, guess it's trainin' time! Don't we have a TV
interview planned today? I'm gonna give 'em a
glimpse of my majestic footwork!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Okay! We want to capture a little of you in action
running on the track! Inari One, are you ready?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hang on a sec. I'm almost good to go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One attaches the charm she received from
her fan to her waist.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: 'Kay, all good! Get ready to be wowed!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
What a fantastic run! Now, to wrap things up, do
you have any words for your fans out there?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm gonna keep it nice and simple.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Nothin' makes me happier than knowin' you're out
there gettin' pumped watchin' me run!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
With all your hopes and dreams on my shoulders,
I'll keep tearin' up the track! Don't forget to cheer
me on, ya hear?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The charm at Inari One's waist sways as she
proclaims her thanks with style!
